title: UiPath (PATH) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: Public provides UiPath (PATH) analyst forecast and price target analysis. Current consensus price target stands at $14.27, indicating 0.00% change from current stock price. Analyst ratings distribution: 13% Strong Buy, 0% Buy, 80% Hold, 7% Sell, 0% Strong Sell. This consensus reflects cautiously neutral stance with majority of analysts recommending holding position. Sell-side revenue growth expectations: 8% growth over next 12 months, slower than recent historical rates. Revenue forecast growth: 8.3% per year on average over next 3 years, compared to 13% growth forecast for Software industry. Earnings trajectory concern: PATH earnings forecast to decline 23.6% per annum over next 3 years, which has tempered analyst enthusiasm despite solid revenue growth. Key investment thesis: UiPath delivering strong sales execution and AI traction, but further signal on agentic driving growth inflection needed to maintain positive outlook. Stock valuation appears compressed relative to growth opportunities but earnings headwinds create risk/reward balance.
